summary: Cash Register .get() fixes verified - All 5 backend tests PASSED. Frontend login, dashboard, and cash register dialog all working correctly. The KeyError bug fixes in shifts_routes.py (lines 219, 364-410, 480-560, 628-640) are confirmed working.

issues: IndexedDB 'is_synced' index error in offline sync - not related to cash register fixes

critical_code_review_comments: All shift['field'] direct access converted to shift.get('field', fallback) - prevents KeyError with missing data
All o['total'] and o['payment_method'] converted to .get() with fallbacks - handles incomplete order data
Duplicate GET /cash-register/summary endpoint removed from server.py - only shifts_routes.py version remains
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cash register .get() fixes verified. All 5 tests pass: 1) GET /api/cash-register/summary returns correct data, 2) POST /api/cash-register/close works with denominations, 3) Returns 404 when no open shift, 4) Creates new shift after close, 5) Works with empty denominations. Frontend dialog opens without errors.

backend_tests.test_01_get_cash_register_summary: PASSED - Returns shift data correctly, creates shift if none exists
backend_tests.test_02_close_cash_register_with_denomin: PASSED - Closes shift with denominations, calculates closing_cash correctly (5*1000 + 2*5000 + 1*10000 = 25000)
backend_tests.test_03_close_when_no_open_shift_returns: PASSED - Returns 404 with Arabic error message 'لا يوجد وردية مفتوحة'
backend_tests.test_04_summary_creates_new_shift_after_: PASSED - Creates new shift after previous was closed

frontend_tests.dashboard_loads: PASSED - Dashboard loads with all quick actions for admin
frontend_tests.cash_register_dialog_opens: PASSED - Dialog opens without 'فشل جلب بيانات الصندوق' error

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: KeyError on o['total'] and o['payment_method'] in order calculations
